packages/quill/src/blots/block.ts.summary: Parchment BlockBlot subclass for paragraph-level lines (P) plus BlockEmbed base and delta-conversion helpers (blockDelta, bubbleFormats). Caches delta/length; handles split, insert, format at block level.
packages/quill/src/blots/block.ts.inputs: Blot indices/lengths, format name+value, text strings, quill-delta Delta; parchment blot tree.
packages/quill/src/blots/block.ts.outputs: Delta representations of blocks/leaves; mutated blot subtree; exported helpers.
packages/quill/src/blots/block.ts.should: Convert a line's leaves to a Delta, bubble inline formats up the blot tree, manage block insert/split/format, invalidate its cache on mutation.
packages/quill/src/blots/block.ts.shouldNot: Own selection, DOM event wiring, or clipboard/history logic; must not include code-token in emitted formats.
packages/quill/src/blots/block.ts.side: Mutates DOM blot tree and internal cache.

packages/quill/src/blots/break.ts.summary: EmbedBlot representing a BR placeholder in an otherwise empty line; removes itself when siblings exist.
packages/quill/src/blots/break.ts.outputs: Zero-length empty-string leaf; self-removal on optimize.
packages/quill/src/blots/break.ts.should: Act as a zero-length line filler and disappear once real content surrounds it.
packages/quill/src/blots/break.ts.side: Removes itself from the blot tree during optimize.

packages/quill/src/blots/container.ts.summary: Thin marker subclass of parchment ContainerBlot with no added behavior; base for list/table/code containers.
packages/quill/src/blots/container.ts.should: Serve as a shared base class for structural container blots.
packages/quill/src/blots/container.ts.shouldNot: Add format, delta, or DOM logic of its own.

packages/quill/src/blots/cursor.ts.summary: EmbedBlot holding a zero-width text node used to place formatting/caret when there is no adjacent text; restores surrounding TextBlots and computes selection remap.
packages/quill/src/blots/cursor.ts.inputs: Scroll, DOM node, Selection instance; MutationRecords; native range.
packages/quill/src/blots/cursor.ts.outputs: EmbedContextRange for selection restore; merged TextBlots.
packages/quill/src/blots/cursor.ts.should: Manage the formatting cursor placeholder, merge neighboring text on restore, escape being nested inside anchors.
packages/quill/src/blots/cursor.ts.shouldNot: Persist as real content or contribute length when not saving.
packages/quill/src/blots/cursor.ts.side: Mutates DOM/blot tree and document selection state.

packages/quill/src/blots/embed.ts.summary: Base EmbedBlot for inline embeds with left/right zero-width guard text nodes; restores typed-into-guard text back into neighboring TextBlots.
packages/quill/src/blots/embed.ts.inputs: Scroll/DOM node; MutationRecords; guard Text nodes.
packages/quill/src/blots/embed.ts.outputs: EmbedContextRange; restored text blots; EmbedContextRange interface.
packages/quill/src/blots/embed.ts.should: Wrap embed content with guards and recover edits made in guard nodes as adjacent text.
packages/quill/src/blots/embed.ts.shouldNot: Handle block-level embeds or format semantics.

packages/quill/src/blots/inline.ts.summary: InlineBlot subclass defining inline format nesting order and comparison, isolating/wrapping ranges so deeper formats sit correctly in the DOM tree.
packages/quill/src/blots/inline.ts.inputs: Format name+value, index/length, blot statics; ordering table.
packages/quill/src/blots/inline.ts.outputs: Reordered/wrapped inline blot subtree; compare() ordering.
packages/quill/src/blots/inline.ts.should: Enforce consistent nesting order of inline formats via optimize and formatAt.
packages/quill/src/blots/inline.ts.shouldNot: Define block formats or specific format tags.

packages/quill/src/blots/scroll.ts.summary: Root ScrollBlot for the editor; owns the document blot tree, converts Deltas to render blocks and inserts contents, exposes line/leaf/lines lookups, batches mutations, and emits scroll lifecycle events.
packages/quill/src/blots/scroll.ts.inputs: Registry, root DIV, Emitter; Deltas; indices/lengths; MutationRecords.
packages/quill/src/blots/scroll.ts.outputs: Mutated blot tree, line/leaf tuples, emitted SCROLL_* events.
packages/quill/src/blots/scroll.ts.should: Be the top-level content container: insert/delete/format at indices, translate Deltas into blocks, batch and emit updates, resolve lines and leaves.
packages/quill/src/blots/scroll.ts.shouldNot: Own selection, clipboard, keyboard, or theme concerns; never remove itself.
packages/quill/src/blots/scroll.ts.side: Mutates DOM, batches MutationRecords, emits via Emitter.

packages/quill/src/blots/text.ts.summary: TextBlot subclass (leaf text) plus escapeText HTML-escaping helper.
packages/quill/src/blots/text.ts.should: Represent text leaves and provide HTML entity escaping for serialization.
packages/quill/src/blots/text.ts.shouldNot: Add formatting or DOM event logic.

packages/quill/src/core.ts.summary: Core entry point: imports Quill and core blots/modules, registers them under blots/* and modules/* paths, and re-exports Quill, Delta, Parchment, Range, and core types.
packages/quill/src/core.ts.outputs: Configured Quill default export with core registrations; re-exported symbols/types.
packages/quill/src/core.ts.should: Wire the minimal 'core' Quill build by registering foundational blots and modules.
packages/quill/src/core.ts.shouldNot: Register formats, themes, UI, or optional modules (that is quill.ts's job).
packages/quill/src/core.ts.side: Mutates Quill's global registry at import time.

packages/quill/src/quill.ts.summary: Full-build entry point: registers all formats, attributors, optional modules (syntax/table/toolbar), themes, and UI pickers onto Quill, then re-exports the assembled Quill and types.
packages/quill/src/quill.ts.inputs: Core Quill plus all format/module/theme/ui classes.
packages/quill/src/quill.ts.should: Assemble the complete Quill distribution by registering every bundled format, module, theme, and UI helper.
packages/quill/src/quill.ts.shouldNot: Contain editor logic; only aggregate and register.
packages/quill/src/quill.ts.side: Mutates Quill registry/imports at import time.

packages/quill/src/core/composition.ts.summary: Tracks IME composition on the scroll DOM node, batching scroll mutations between compositionstart/end and emitting composition lifecycle events.
packages/quill/src/core/composition.ts.outputs: isComposing flag; emitted COMPOSITION_* events; scroll batch start/end.
packages/quill/src/core/composition.ts.should: Coordinate IME composition so DOM changes are batched and reported, skipping Embed targets.
packages/quill/src/core/composition.ts.shouldNot: Apply formats or resolve selection ranges.
packages/quill/src/core/composition.ts.side: Adds DOM listeners, emits events, toggles scroll batching.

packages/quill/src/core/editor.ts.summary: Central content-model engine: applies Deltas to the scroll tree, performs insert/delete/format/embed operations, computes formats and semantic HTML, and diffs to produce change Deltas maintaining a canonical delta cache.
packages/quill/src/core/editor.ts.inputs: Scroll; Deltas; indices/lengths; format maps; MutationRecords; selection info.
packages/quill/src/core/editor.ts.outputs: Change Deltas, current-contents Delta, format maps, HTML strings.
packages/quill/src/core/editor.ts.should: Translate between the Delta document model and the blot tree, and emit accurate change Deltas including implicit-newline handling.
packages/quill/src/core/editor.ts.shouldNot: Own DOM selection, event listeners, or module behavior.
packages/quill/src/core/editor.ts.side: Mutates scroll blot tree and its cached delta.

packages/quill/src/core/emitter.ts.summary: EventEmitter3 subclass defining Quill's event/source enums, DOM event fan-out to editor instances, and per-node DOM listener registration/dispatch.
packages/quill/src/core/emitter.ts.inputs: Event names/args; DOM events; node+handler registrations.
packages/quill/src/core/emitter.ts.outputs: Emitted events; EmitterSource type; DOM dispatch to registered handlers.
packages/quill/src/core/emitter.ts.should: Be the pub/sub hub and route global DOM events to the right editor instance.
packages/quill/src/core/emitter.ts.shouldNot: Contain editor/model logic or know about specific modules.
packages/quill/src/core/emitter.ts.side: Registers global document listeners at module load; logs events.

packages/quill/src/core/instances.ts.summary: Module-level WeakMap associating DOM container nodes with their Quill instance.
packages/quill/src/core/instances.ts.shouldNot: Hold any logic or strong references.
packages/quill/src/core/instances.ts.side: Creates a shared mutable WeakMap singleton.

packages/quill/src/core/logger.ts.summary: Namespaced console logger with a global level threshold and DebugLevel type; exposes namespace factory and level setter.
packages/quill/src/core/logger.ts.inputs: Log level, namespace string, log args.
packages/quill/src/core/logger.ts.should: Provide leveled, namespaced debug logging gated by a global level.
packages/quill/src/core/logger.ts.side: Writes to console; holds module-level level state.

packages/quill/src/core/module.ts.summary: Abstract base class for Quill modules storing the Quill instance and options with an empty DEFAULTS.
packages/quill/src/core/module.ts.should: Define the common constructor contract shared by all modules.

packages/quill/src/core/quill.ts.summary: The Quill editor class: constructs and wires scroll/editor/selection/emitter/theme/modules, exposes the public API (insert/delete/format/getContents/selection/events), the static register/import registry, config expansion, and the Range class.
packages/quill/src/core/quill.ts.inputs: Container element, QuillOptions; API call args (indices, deltas, formats, sources).
packages/quill/src/core/quill.ts.outputs: Change Deltas, formats, bounds, ranges, HTML/text; emitted events; registered imports.
packages/quill/src/core/quill.ts.should: Be the public facade orchestrating core subsystems and the registry; normalize overloaded args and emit change events.
packages/quill/src/core/quill.ts.shouldNot: Implement low-level model or DOM-selection algorithms directly (delegates to Editor/Selection/Scroll).
packages/quill/src/core/quill.ts.side: Mutates DOM, registry, and instance map; emits events.

packages/quill/src/core/selection.ts.summary: Bridges the browser Selection API and Quill's index model: normalizes native ranges, converts range<->native, computes caret/selection bounds, restores cursor, and emits SELECTION_CHANGE. Defines Range and Bounds.
packages/quill/src/core/selection.ts.outputs: Range objects, native ranges, Bounds; emitted selection events; Range/Bounds types.
packages/quill/src/core/selection.ts.should: Own selection tracking and translation between DOM ranges and document indices, including bounds and cursor restore.
packages/quill/src/core/selection.ts.shouldNot: Mutate document contents or apply formats beyond cursor placement.
packages/quill/src/core/selection.ts.side: Reads/sets document selection, focuses root, emits events, adds listeners.

packages/quill/src/core/theme.ts.summary: Base Theme class managing module instantiation from options via addModule, with ThemeOptions/ThemeConstructor types and a themes registry.
packages/quill/src/core/theme.ts.outputs: Instantiated modules keyed by name; theme metadata types.
packages/quill/src/core/theme.ts.should: Provide the theme lifecycle and module-loading mechanism.

packages/quill/src/core/utils/createRegi.summary: Builds a fresh parchment Registry containing the core blots plus the named formats and their required-container chains, warning on unknown formats or container cycles.
packages/quill/src/core/utils/createRegi.inputs: Format name list, source Registry, debug logger.
packages/quill/src/core/utils/createRegi.should: Produce a registry limited to the configured formats plus mandatory core blots and required containers.
packages/quill/src/core/utils/createRegi.shouldNot: Mutate the source registry or resolve editor logic.
packages/quill/src/core/utils/createRegi.side: Logs errors via provided debug object.

packages/quill/src/core/utils/scrollRect.summary: Scrolls ancestor scroll containers so a target rect becomes visible, following the CSSOM 'nearest' algorithm, with optional smooth animation; exports Rect and options types.
packages/quill/src/core/utils/scrollRect.inputs: Root element, target Rect, options; reads layout/computed styles.
packages/quill/src/core/utils/scrollRect.should: Compute and apply minimal scroll offsets to reveal a rect across nested scrollables.
packages/quill/src/core/utils/scrollRect.shouldNot: Know about blots, selection, or Quill internals.
packages/quill/src/core/utils/scrollRect.side: Reads DOM geometry and mutates element/window scroll positions.

packages/quill/src/types.d.ts.summary: Ambient TypeScript declarations for '*.svg' string imports and the QUILL_VERSION global.
packages/quill/src/types.d.ts.should: Declare build-time SVG import and version-constant types.

packages/quill/src/formats/align.ts.summary: Block-scope alignment format defined as attribute, class, and style attributors with whitelist right/center/justify.
packages/quill/src/formats/align.ts.should: Declare the alignment format in its three attributor variants.

packages/quill/src/formats/background.ts.summary: Inline background-color format as a class attributor and a ColorAttributor-based style attributor (hex normalization).

packages/quill/src/formats/blockquote.ts.summary: Block format subclassing Block with blotName/tagName 'blockquote'.

packages/quill/src/formats/bold.ts.summary: Inline bold format (STRONG/B) with static create/formats and an optimize that normalizes to the preferred tag.
packages/quill/src/formats/bold.ts.should: Define bold and canonicalize its tag on optimize; serve as base for italic/strike.
packages/quill/src/formats/bold.ts.side: May replace its DOM node during optimize.

packages/quill/src/formats/code.ts.summary: Code formats: inline Code blot plus block CodeBlock and its CodeBlockContainer (serializes to <pre>, disables spellcheck, registers container).
packages/quill/src/formats/code.ts.inputs: DOM nodes; index/length for code() and html().
packages/quill/src/formats/code.ts.outputs: Code/CodeBlock/CodeBlockContainer classes; code text and <pre> HTML.
packages/quill/src/formats/code.ts.should: Define inline and block code formats and their required container/HTML serialization.
packages/quill/src/formats/code.ts.shouldNot: Perform syntax highlighting (that's the syntax module).
packages/quill/src/formats/code.ts.side: Registers CodeBlockContainer via Quill on register().

packages/quill/src/formats/color.ts.summary: Inline text color format: ColorAttributor style attributor that normalizes rgb() to hex, plus class and style attributor singletons.
packages/quill/src/formats/color.ts.should: Declare inline color format and normalize computed rgb colors to hex.

packages/quill/src/formats/direction.ts.summary: Block-scope text direction format as attribute (dir), class, and style attributors whitelisting 'rtl'.
packages/quill/src/formats/direction.ts.should: Declare the RTL direction format variants.

packages/quill/src/formats/font.ts.summary: Inline font-family format: class attributor plus a StyleAttributor subclass stripping quotes; whitelist serif/monospace.
packages/quill/src/formats/font.ts.should: Declare inline font format and sanitize font-family style values.

packages/quill/src/formats/formula.ts.summary: Inline Embed for KaTeX formulas; renders LaTeX into the node on create and serializes back to a span.
packages/quill/src/formats/formula.ts.should: Render and represent math formulas via KaTeX as inline embeds.
packages/quill/src/formats/formula.ts.side: Reads global window.katex and mutates DOM on create.

packages/quill/src/formats/header.ts.summary: Block format for H1-H6 headers; formats() returns the header level from the tag.
packages/quill/src/formats/header.ts.should: Define the header block format and derive its level.

packages/quill/src/formats/image.ts.summary: Inline image EmbedBlot with sanitized src, alt/height/width attribute formats, and a data/URL match test.
packages/quill/src/formats/image.ts.inputs: URL string value; DOM node attributes.
packages/quill/src/formats/image.ts.outputs: Image blot; formats map; sanitized src.
packages/quill/src/formats/image.ts.should: Represent images, sanitize their URLs, and expose alt/size formats.
packages/quill/src/formats/image.ts.side: Mutates its own DOM attributes on format.

packages/quill/src/formats/indent.ts.summary: Block-scope indent format via a ClassAttributor subclass supporting relative +1/-1 adjustment and numeric levels 1-8.
packages/quill/src/formats/indent.ts.should: Apply/normalize block indentation levels including relative changes.

packages/quill/src/formats/italic.ts.summary: Inline italic format subclassing Bold with EM/I tags.
packages/quill/src/formats/italic.ts.should: Define italic reusing Bold's tag-canonicalization behavior.

packages/quill/src/formats/link.ts.summary: Inline link (A) format that sanitizes href against a protocol whitelist, sets rel/target, and exposes a shared sanitize() helper.
packages/quill/src/formats/link.ts.should: Define the link format and guard URLs against unsafe protocols.
packages/quill/src/formats/link.ts.side: Mutates DOM attributes; sanitize() reads via a throwaway anchor element.

packages/quill/src/formats/list.ts.summary: List formats: ListContainer (OL) and ListItem (LI) block; ListItem manages data-list value, a clickable checkbox UI toggling checked/unchecked, and registers its container.
packages/quill/src/formats/list.ts.inputs: list value string; DOM node; scroll; UI events.
packages/quill/src/formats/list.ts.should: Define list items, their container, and checkbox interaction.
packages/quill/src/formats/list.ts.shouldNot: Handle indentation math beyond format passthrough.
packages/quill/src/formats/list.ts.side: Attaches UI element with DOM listeners; registers container.

packages/quill/src/formats/script.ts.summary: Inline superscript/subscript format (SUB/SUP) mapping value 'super'/'sub' to tags.

packages/quill/src/formats/size.ts.summary: Inline font-size format as class attributor (small/large/huge) and style attributor (px whitelist).

packages/quill/src/formats/strike.ts.summary: Inline strikethrough format subclassing Bold with S/STRIKE tags.

packages/quill/src/formats/table.ts.summary: Table blot hierarchy (TableCell, TableRow, TableBody, TableContainer) with row-id tracking, cell/row offsets, merge checks, and structural operations (balance/insert/delete column/row) plus tableId generator.
packages/quill/src/formats/table.ts.inputs: DOM nodes; row id values; column/row indices.
packages/quill/src/formats/table.ts.outputs: Table blot classes; structural mutations; tableId().
packages/quill/src/formats/table.ts.should: Model table structure and provide cell/row/column manipulation and balancing.
packages/quill/src/formats/table.ts.shouldNot: Own toolbar UI or selection; delegate module-level actions to modules/table.
packages/quill/src/formats/table.ts.side: Mutates blot tree; generates random ids.

packages/quill/src/formats/underline.ts.summary: Inline underline format subclassing Inline with tag U.

packages/quill/src/formats/video.ts.summary: Block-level video embed (IFRAME) subclassing BlockEmbed; sanitizes src via Link, exposes height/width formats and an anchor HTML serialization.
packages/quill/src/formats/video.ts.outputs: Video blot; formats map; sanitized src; HTML.
packages/quill/src/formats/video.ts.should: Represent embedded videos as block embeds with sanitized URLs.

packages/quill/src/modules/clipboard.ts.summary: Clipboard module: intercepts copy/cut/paste, converts pasted HTML/text into Deltas through a matcher pipeline (traverse + per-tag/style/attributor matchers), normalizes external HTML, and inserts results.
packages/quill/src/modules/clipboard.ts.inputs: ClipboardEvents; HTML/text; matcher config; quill instance.
packages/quill/src/modules/clipboard.ts.outputs: Delta conversions; clipboard data; updated document/selection.
packages/quill/src/modules/clipboard.ts.should: Own clipboard interchange and HTML<->Delta conversion via matchers.
packages/quill/src/modules/clipboard.ts.shouldNot: Define formats themselves; must not bypass sanitization for pasted content.
packages/quill/src/modules/clipboard.ts.side: Adds DOM listeners, reads/writes clipboard, mutates document.

packages/quill/src/modules/history.ts.summary: Undo/redo module recording inverse Deltas onto undo/redo stacks with time-based coalescing, transforming stacks for remote changes, and restoring selection; exposes getLastChangeIndex.
packages/quill/src/modules/history.ts.inputs: EDITOR_CHANGE events (deltas, ranges, source); keyboard shortcuts; beforeinput.
packages/quill/src/modules/history.ts.outputs: Undo/redo stack state; applied inverse Deltas; restored selection.
packages/quill/src/modules/history.ts.should: Maintain and apply edit history with delay/maxStack policy and userOnly filtering.
packages/quill/src/modules/history.ts.shouldNot: Directly manipulate DOM selection ranges or formats beyond quill API calls.

packages/quill/src/modules/input.ts.summary: Handles beforeinput insertText/insertReplacementText and composition-start to replace selected ranges, preserving first-character formats via the Delta API.
packages/quill/src/modules/input.ts.should: Normalize native text-replacement input into Quill Delta updates.
packages/quill/src/modules/input.ts.side: Adds DOM listeners; mutates document and selection.

packages/quill/src/modules/keyboard.ts.summary: Keyboard module: registers and matches key bindings with context (collapsed/format/prefix/suffix), provides default handlers (Enter, Backspace/Delete, indent, code/table/embed navigation), and shared deleteRange helper.
packages/quill/src/modules/keyboard.ts.inputs: KeyboardEvents; binding configs; ranges/context; quill instance.
packages/quill/src/modules/keyboard.ts.outputs: Executed binding handlers; document/selection mutations; exported deleteRange/normalize/SHORTKEY.
packages/quill/src/modules/keyboard.ts.should: Own key-binding dispatch and default editing key behaviors.
packages/quill/src/modules/keyboard.ts.shouldNot: Define formats or perform clipboard/history logic directly.
packages/quill/src/modules/keyboard.ts.side: Adds keydown listener; mutates document and selection.

packages/quill/src/modules/normalizeExte.summary: Runs the ordered set of external-HTML normalizers (msWord, googleDocs) over a parsed paste Document.
packages/quill/src/modules/normalizeExte.should: Dispatch paste HTML through each source-specific normalizer.

packages/quill/src/modules/normalizeExte.summary: Normalizer for Google Docs paste HTML: unwraps normal-weight bold spans and strips redundant BR-based empty lines when the GDocs guid marker is present.
packages/quill/src/modules/normalizeExte.should: Clean Google Docs specific markup before conversion.
packages/quill/src/modules/normalizeExte.shouldNot: Touch non-GDocs content (guarded by marker check).

packages/quill/src/modules/normalizeExte.summary: Normalizer for MS Word paste HTML: parses mso-list styled paragraphs into real UL/LI lists with indent classes, removing ignored marker nodes, when the Word xmlns marker is present.
packages/quill/src/modules/normalizeExte.outputs: Mutated Document with proper list markup.
packages/quill/src/modules/normalizeExte.should: Reconstruct Word pseudo-lists into standard list elements.
packages/quill/src/modules/normalizeExte.shouldNot: Affect non-Word content (guarded by xmlns check).

packages/quill/src/modules/syntax.ts.summary: Syntax highlighting module: defines CodeToken/SyntaxCodeBlock/SyntaxCodeBlockContainer blots, runs highlight.js over code blocks on a timer, applies token formats via Delta diffing, and adds a language selector UI.
packages/quill/src/modules/syntax.ts.inputs: highlight.js lib; code block text; SCROLL events; language options.
packages/quill/src/modules/syntax.ts.outputs: Highlighted token blots; language UI; token Deltas.
packages/quill/src/modules/syntax.ts.should: Apply syntax highlighting to code blocks and manage language selection.
packages/quill/src/modules/syntax.ts.shouldNot: Work without highlight.js (throws); must not persist code-token in output deltas.
packages/quill/src/modules/syntax.ts.side: Registers blots, adds timers/listeners, mutates DOM and selection.

packages/quill/src/modules/table.ts.summary: Table module exposing user operations (insert/delete table/row/column, balance cells) over the table blot hierarchy and keeping cells balanced on scroll changes.
packages/quill/src/modules/table.ts.inputs: Current selection; row/column offsets; SCROLL_OPTIMIZE mutations.
packages/quill/src/modules/table.ts.should: Provide the table manipulation API and auto-balance cells.
packages/quill/src/modules/table.ts.shouldNot: Define table blot structure (lives in formats/table).
packages/quill/src/modules/table.ts.side: Registers table blots/listeners; mutates document and selection.

packages/quill/src/modules/tableEmbed.ts.summary: Registers a 'table-embed' quill-delta embed type with compose/transform/invert semantics over structured TableData (rows/columns/cells), plus position/reindex helpers.
packages/quill/src/modules/tableEmbed.ts.should: Implement OT semantics for table embeds within the Delta model.
packages/quill/src/modules/tableEmbed.ts.shouldNot: Touch the DOM or blot tree.
packages/quill/src/modules/tableEmbed.ts.side: Registers a global Delta embed handler on register().

packages/quill/src/modules/toolbar.ts.summary: Toolbar module: builds or binds a toolbar container, attaches format handlers to buttons/selects, dispatches format/embed actions via the quill API, and reflects active formats on selection change; exports addControls and default handlers.
packages/quill/src/modules/toolbar.ts.inputs: Toolbar config/DOM; control clicks/changes; current range/formats.
packages/quill/src/modules/toolbar.ts.outputs: Toolbar DOM; format actions; active-state updates.
packages/quill/src/modules/toolbar.ts.should: Wire toolbar controls to formatting actions and keep them in sync with selection.
packages/quill/src/modules/toolbar.ts.side: Creates/mutates DOM, adds listeners, mutates document via quill API.

packages/quill/src/modules/uiNode.ts.summary: Module fixing caret placement around ql-ui nodes: arrow-key bindings and a guarded selectionchange listener that moves the caret past a line's UI node.
packages/quill/src/modules/uiNode.ts.should: Prevent the caret from landing before a UI node during navigation.
packages/quill/src/modules/uiNode.ts.side: Adds keydown/selectionchange listeners; mutates DOM selection.

packages/quill/src/modules/uploader.ts.summary: Upload module handling file drops and image pastes, filtering by mimetype and invoking a handler that (by default) reads images as data URLs and inserts them as embeds.
packages/quill/src/modules/uploader.ts.outputs: Insert Deltas for uploaded images; updated selection.
packages/quill/src/modules/uploader.ts.should: Capture dropped/pasted files and insert supported ones via the configured handler.
packages/quill/src/modules/uploader.ts.shouldNot: Define the image blot or perform network uploads itself.
packages/quill/src/modules/uploader.ts.side: Adds drop listener; reads files; mutates document and selection.

packages/quill/src/themes/base.ts.summary: BaseTheme and BaseTooltip: wires document click dismissal, builds toolbar buttons/pickers with icons, provides default toolbar handlers (image/video/formula), and a tooltip base for link/video/formula editing.
packages/quill/src/themes/base.ts.inputs: Quill, ThemeOptions; toolbar/tooltip DOM; selects/buttons; icons.
packages/quill/src/themes/base.ts.should: Provide shared theme scaffolding (pickers, tooltip, toolbar extension hooks) for concrete themes.
packages/quill/src/themes/base.ts.side: Creates DOM, adds listeners, mutates document via quill API.

packages/quill/src/themes/bubble.ts.summary: Bubble theme: a floating BubbleTooltip that follows the selection, its toolbar config, and BubbleTheme extending BaseTheme to build pickers/buttons and position the tooltip on selection.
packages/quill/src/themes/bubble.ts.inputs: Quill, ThemeOptions; selection ranges; toolbar config.
packages/quill/src/themes/bubble.ts.should: Implement the bubble (inline floating toolbar) theme.
packages/quill/src/themes/bubble.ts.side: Creates DOM, listens to selection changes, positions tooltip.

packages/quill/src/themes/snow.ts.summary: Snow theme: a fixed toolbar with a SnowTooltip for link editing/preview, default toolbar config, and SnowTheme extending BaseTheme to build pickers/buttons and wire link interactions.
packages/quill/src/themes/snow.ts.inputs: Quill, ThemeOptions; toolbar config; link clicks.
packages/quill/src/themes/snow.ts.outputs: Snow theme UI; link tooltip behavior.
packages/quill/src/themes/snow.ts.should: Implement the snow (fixed toolbar) theme and its link tooltip.
packages/quill/src/themes/snow.ts.side: Creates DOM, adds listeners, mutates document via quill API.

packages/quill/src/ui/color-picker.ts.summary: ColorPicker extends Picker to render color swatches, mark primary colors, and reflect the chosen color onto the label icon fill/stroke.
packages/quill/src/ui/color-picker.ts.inputs: Select element, label HTML; option values.
packages/quill/src/ui/color-picker.ts.outputs: Color picker DOM; selection reflected on label.

packages/quill/src/ui/icon-picker.ts.summary: IconPicker extends Picker to render each item as an icon and mirror the selected item's icon into the label.
packages/quill/src/ui/icon-picker.ts.outputs: Icon picker DOM; label icon updates.

packages/quill/src/ui/icons.ts.summary: Aggregates SVG icon imports into a keyed map of format-name to icon string (or per-value sub-maps).
packages/quill/src/ui/icons.ts.should: Provide the central icon registry for toolbar/pickers.

packages/quill/src/ui/picker.ts.summary: Accessible custom dropdown replacing a native select: builds label/options DOM, syncs selection both ways, handles keyboard/mouse toggling, aria attributes, and change dispatch.
packages/quill/src/ui/picker.ts.outputs: Picker DOM; synchronized select value; change events.
packages/quill/src/ui/picker.ts.should: Provide the base accessible picker widget mirroring a select.
packages/quill/src/ui/picker.ts.shouldNot: Know about Quill formats or the editor model.
packages/quill/src/ui/picker.ts.side: Creates/mutates DOM, adds listeners, dispatches events.

packages/quill/src/ui/tooltip.ts.summary: Base Tooltip widget added to the editor container that shows/hides and positions itself relative to a bounds rect, flipping/shifting to stay within the bounds container.
packages/quill/src/ui/tooltip.ts.should: Provide generic tooltip positioning and visibility.
packages/quill/src/ui/tooltip.ts.shouldNot: Contain link/video editing logic (BaseTooltip subclass does).
packages/quill/src/ui/tooltip.ts.side: Creates DOM, reads geometry, mutates styles/classes; may add scroll listener.
